default.reason: gardening is high-volume, low-stakes, batch-latency background work (issue triage, label proposals, trajectory dedup) -> the small/fast model is adequate; a wrong gardening label costs a re-run, not a bad production write

plan.reason: the steady-state gardening pass (classify priority/area/kind, propose labels) -> small/local model; a cheap scout labels complexity first
EXPANSION: splitting an oversized needs-split issue into focused sub-issues is genuine hard judgment -> escalate to the large model when the scout flags high complexity
CONTRACTION (confirm a dup/stale/dormant cluster for close) is low-stakes-but-irreversible -> a two-model vote ensemble proposes a close only when two cheap models agree, never one model alone
